sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62631" key="leuka/ntuc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκ-άντυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n62631.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bright-orbed</tr_>, of the moon, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Doroth.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:3:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
